description: A sustainability specialist at a Pacific Northwest timber products company is evaluating the feasibility of building an on-site biomass power plant to convert sawmill waste into electricity. Model a 50 MW (50,000 kW) biomass direct-combustion power plant using NREL's PySAM library. Create and execute a Python script at /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/biomass_model.py that utilizes a TMY weather file (location details in /home/ga/.SAM/solar_resource_dir.txt) to simulate the plant's performance. The simulation must use a 50,000 kW nameplate capacity. Export the resulting annual energy (kWh) and capacity factor (%) to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/biomass_results.json using the keys "nameplate_kw", "annual_energy_kwh", and "capacity_factor_percent".
